DEFENDANT HAS NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT THE RELATION BACK DOCTRINE DOES NOT APPLY TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST IT. SPECIFICALLY, DEFENDANT DID NOT PRESENT SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF KNEW OF FACTS GIVING RISE TO A CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT KELLY MOORE AT THE TIME THAT PLAINTIFF FILED HIS ACTION. The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Denied.
